nasb.text: He made all the utensils of the altar, the pails and the shovels and the basins, the flesh hooks and the firepans; he made all its utensils of bronze.

esv.text: And he made all the utensils of the altar, the pots, the shovels, the basins, the forks, and the fire pans. He made all its utensils of bronze.

cnv.text: 又做壇上的一切器具，就是盆、鏟、盤、肉叉和火盆；壇上的一切器具都是用銅做的。

ccb.text: 他用铜造一切的器具，就是盆、铲、碗、肉叉、火鼎。
